summary: Albertsons export failures with snapshotting_error/no_batches and blank, unknown, or singleton snapshotting-stage failure reasons.

Collected deeper snapshotting log evidence for all 10 Albertsons unknown/blank snapshotting failures. Most failures were Quervice 503s/timeouts during snapshotting reports; 10581 and 12606 ended as pre_snapshotting_check lock-expiry failures; 3283 had both an earlier lock-expiry attempt and a later precheck timeout attempt.

summary: User reports this unknown snapshotting failure cohort is already covered by an open incident; keep case open for active tracking and do not prioritize as the next fresh investigation unless new evidence arrives.
